name: MasteryAI
introduction: A premium, enterprise-grade AI-powered education ecosystem that supports trainers, educators, and students. The platform consists of a highly optimized React 19 / Next.js frontend and four backend microservices orchestrating secure Google OAuth/JWT auth, classroom provisioning, Bring-Your-Own-Key (BYOK) LLM credentials vaults, pgvector-based RAG engines, and real-time SSE token streaming.
activities: Architected a modular microservice ecosystem comprising a Next.js frontend (FE1), Java/Spring Boot core learning and classroom managers (BE1, BE2), and a FastAPI LLM gateway (BE3).
Developed a domain-driven, role-governed frontend using React 19, Next.js 16 (App Router), Tailwind CSS v4, and daisyUI v5 supporting four distinct user roles (Admin, Trainer, Educator, Student).
Built a secure Bring-Your-Own-Key (BYOK) credential service with envelope encryption at rest using AWS KMS, ensuring LLM API keys are encrypted at the application layer before reaching the DB.

Engineered a high-performance RAG pipeline on FastAPI and LangChain leveraging PostgreSQL/pgvector for document embeddings, DynamoDB for chat history logging, and Redis Streams for SSE real-time token streaming.
Established decoupled notifications and document ingestion queues using AWS SQS and S3, alongside Redis session caching, to handle highly concurrent learning room states and presence tracking.
problemSolved: Building a scalable AI education system requires balancing high-throughput streaming and RAG workloads with strict user access control and secure API key handling. MasteryAI resolves this by implementing a polyglot microservice layout: Java Spring Boot manages the rigid transactional structures (auth, rosters, keys), Python FastAPI/LangChain accelerates vector queries and LLM coordination, and Next.js delivers a responsive, role-adaptive web experience.
